description: arXiv:2607.20551v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Effective molecular representation learning is crucial for accurate molecular property prediction. Recently, numerous self-supervised learning (SSL) approaches leveraging 3D GNNs have been developed to capture comprehensive 3D structural information for drug discovery. However, existing methods lack explicit physical constraints and are highly s...
author: Tianming Han, Li Zhang, Qi Zhao
